item.message: Skill descriptions were shortened to fit the 2% skills context budget. Codex can still see every skill, but some descriptions are shorter. Disable unused skills or plugins to leave more room for the rest.

item.text: I’ll inspect the three requested source modules, make the smallest schema/model/query changes, then run the test suite.

item.text: The account model already persists arbitrary account fields on both insert and `$set`; I’m adding enum validation at the schema layer and exposing the field in the summary projection.

item.aggregated_output:
npm notice run build-bench-mongo-schema-evolution-enterprise@1.0.0 test
npm notice run node tests/acceptance.test.mjs
Build-Bench enterprise acceptance passed: mongo

item.text:
Implemented account `preferredPaymentMethod` support.

- Added optional enum validation to the accounts MongoDB schema.
- `createAccount` and `updateAccount` persist the new field.
- Added `preferredPaymentMethod` to `getOrderSummary`.
- Preserved account creation compatibility by supplying `createdAt` when absent.

Verified with `npm test` — acceptance suite passes.
